title: Module 4.3: Illinois & Massachusetts Regulations
subtitle: Comprehensive State Regulatory Frameworks
description: Explore the detailed laser safety regulations of Illinois and Massachusetts, including registration requirements, LSO qualifications, entertainment laser provisions, and enforcement mechanisms.
learning_objectives: Identify the regulatory authorities and legal foundations for Illinois and Massachusetts laser regulations
Understand registration requirements, fees, and notification procedures for both states
Compare LSO qualification requirements between Illinois and Massachusetts
Apply entertainment laser show requirements for interstate operations
Analyze enforcement mechanisms and penalty structures
